_meta.title: Soldut — Mech chassis canonical T-pose (full Pipeline 1)
_meta.description: Pipeline 1 from documents/m5/11-art-direction.md, in its full form for a capable GPU (≥12 GB VRAM; authored + verified on an RTX 5090 / 32 GB). Illustrious-XL v0.1 base + ControlNet-Union SDXL 1.0 promax (geometry locked from the hand-drawn/programmatic T-pose skeleton via LineartStandardPreprocessor) + IP-Adapter PLUS SDXL ViT-H (style anchored to tools/comfy/style_anchor/<chassis>_anchor_*.png) + 30-step dpmpp_2m_sde / karras at cfg 7.5 + sdxl-vae-fp16-fix. The LoRA stack the spec lists (battletech_battlemechs / super_robot_diffusion_xl / lineart_sdxl_v3) is Civitai-gated and is NOT wired here — to add it, insert a LoraLoader chain between node 1 (CheckpointLoaderSimple) and node 23 (IPAdapterAdvanced) on the MODEL line and re-point node 30/31 CLIPTextEncode at the last LoraLoader's CLIP. Style consistency is carried by the IP-Adapter anchor + the Pipeline 7 post (palette remap + halftone) in tools/comfy/crop_canonical.py. For an 8 GB-VRAM machine use mech_chassis_canonical_8gb_v1.json instead (Lightning 4-step, no IP-Adapter, T2I-Adapter Lineart in place of ControlNet-Union, CPU VAE).
_meta.format: ComfyUI API format. Load via the UI's Load button (recent ComfyUI auto-converts) or POST to /prompt via tools/comfy/run_workflow.py / asset.py. run_workflow.py rebinds node 10 (LoadImage 'Skeleton') and node 20 (LoadImage 'Style anchor') to the uploaded PNGs, and can override KSampler seed/steps/cfg and the EmptyLatentImage batch_size.

models.checkpoint: Illustrious-XL-v0.1.safetensors  (OnomaAIResearch/Illustrious-xl-early-release-v0 on HF; license:other — SDXL-derived, commercial output OK per documents/m5/11-art-direction.md §License hygiene)
models.controlnet: controlnet-union-sdxl-1.0_promax.safetensors  (xinsir/controlnet-union-sdxl-1.0 'diffusion_pytorch_model_promax.safetensors' on HF, flattened to a top-level filename so the path has no platform-specific separator; apache-2.0)
models.clip_vision: clip_vision_h.safetensors  (OpenCLIP ViT-H/14 laion2B — the image encoder IP-Adapter PLUS SDXL requires)

_meta.title: Preprocess skeleton → canny edges (crisp, preserves input detail)
